markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Review project status, demo a new AI tool, and finalize priorities.](https://fathom.video/share/uwkeRPJe_rWFhecpNMs-UdE5raNvfsZE?tab=summary&timestamp=2708.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**New AI Tool:** GrowthX is replacing Scrunch with CheckDat, an internal tool providing immediate historical data and deeper context for evaluation-stage queries.](https://fathom.video/share/uwkeRPJe_rWFhecpNMs-UdE5raNvfsZE?tab=summary&timestamp=668.0)
  - [**Dual-Tool Strategy:** Diligent will run CheckDat and Scrunch simultaneously. CheckDat will be used for discovery and gap analysis, while Scrunch remains the source of truth for tracking specific, high-priority prompts.](https://fathom.video/share/uwkeRPJe_rWFhecpNMs-UdE5raNvfsZE?tab=summary&timestamp=1213.0)
  - [**Strategic Priority Shift:** Content priorities now focus on high-differentiation products (ACL, DMI, Vault) to build a competitive moat, shifting from the broader GRC refresh.](https://fathom.video/share/uwkeRPJe_rWFhecpNMs-UdE5raNvfsZE?tab=summary&timestamp=2511.0)
  - [**Project Handoff:** Vivek Shankar is transitioning all project responsibilities to Carrie Chowske, who will now lead the Diligent account.](https://fathom.video/share/uwkeRPJe_rWFhecpNMs-UdE5raNvfsZE?tab=summary&timestamp=2708.0)

## Topics

### New AI Visibility Tool: CheckDat

  - [GrowthX demoed CheckDat, its new internal tool replacing Scrunch for AI visibility reporting.](https://fathom.video/share/uwkeRPJe_rWFhecpNMs-UdE5raNvfsZE?tab=summary&timestamp=668.0)
  - [**Key Differentiators from Scrunch:**](https://fathom.video/share/uwkeRPJe_rWFhecpNMs-UdE5raNvfsZE?tab=summary&timestamp=1373.0)
      - [**Contextual Accuracy:** Uses deep brand context (via Exa) to filter out non-brand mentions, improving precision.](https://fathom.video/share/uwkeRPJe_rWFhecpNMs-UdE5raNvfsZE?tab=summary&timestamp=1389.0)
      - [**Immediate Historical Data:** Library prompts provide up to 90 days of historical data instantly, enabling faster testing.](https://fathom.video/share/uwkeRPJe_rWFhecpNMs-UdE5raNvfsZE?tab=summary&timestamp=1487.0)
      - [**Evaluation-Stage Focus:** Prompts target high-impact, evaluation-stage queries (e.g., "best tools for X") to capture users closer to conversion.](https://fathom.video/share/uwkeRPJe_rWFhecpNMs-UdE5raNvfsZE?tab=summary&timestamp=810.0)
      - [**Citation Tracking:** Links directly to the specific page cited by the AI model.](https://fathom.video/share/uwkeRPJe_rWFhecpNMs-UdE5raNvfsZE?tab=summary&timestamp=1035.0)
      - [**Discovery Engine:** The "Sources" page acts as an AI SERP, identifying the most commonly cited pages for a given category.](https://fathom.video/share/uwkeRPJe_rWFhecpNMs-UdE5raNvfsZE?tab=summary&timestamp=1108.0)

### Strategic Rationale for Dual-Tool Strategy

  - [Tyler Phelps outlined a dual-tool strategy, using both CheckDat and Scrunch to serve distinct purposes.](https://fathom.video/share/uwkeRPJe_rWFhecpNMs-UdE5raNvfsZE?tab=summary&timestamp=1213.0)
  - [**Scrunch as Source of Truth:**](https://fathom.video/share/uwkeRPJe_rWFhecpNMs-UdE5raNvfsZE?tab=summary&timestamp=1253.0)
      - [Essential for tracking performance against specific, high-priority prompts that drive revenue.](https://fathom.video/share/uwkeRPJe_rWFhecpNMs-UdE5raNvfsZE?tab=summary&timestamp=1896.0)
      - [Diligent's growth strategy prioritizes expansion revenue over inbound for many solutions.](https://fathom.video/share/uwkeRPJe_rWFhecpNMs-UdE5raNvfsZE?tab=summary&timestamp=1896.0)
      - [**Example:** The "Boards" business unit (BU) is a key entry point with a strong expansion motion, turning initial $50k deals into $250k+ opportunities.](https://fathom.video/share/uwkeRPJe_rWFhecpNMs-UdE5raNvfsZE?tab=summary&timestamp=2040.0)
      - [Focus must be on widening the competitive gap in these specific, high-differentiation areas.](https://fathom.video/share/uwkeRPJe_rWFhecpNMs-UdE5raNvfsZE?tab=summary&timestamp=1716.0)
  - [**CheckDat for Discovery & Gap Analysis:**](https://fathom.video/share/uwkeRPJe_rWFhecpNMs-UdE5raNvfsZE?tab=summary&timestamp=1637.0)
      - [Ideal for finding new, high-potential prompts and identifying gaps in the current measurement set.](https://fathom.video/share/uwkeRPJe_rWFhecpNMs-UdE5raNvfsZE?tab=summary&timestamp=1637.0)
      - [**Limitation:** The current competitor view is too broad and skews metrics. It fails to show the true competitive distance against direct rivals by including larger, less relevant players (e.g., Vanta).](https://fathom.video/share/uwkeRPJe_rWFhecpNMs-UdE5raNvfsZE?tab=summary&timestamp=2133.0)
      - [Carrie will recommend a product update to allow for BU-specific competitor groupings.](https://fathom.video/share/uwkeRPJe_rWFhecpNMs-UdE5raNvfsZE?tab=summary&timestamp=1755.0)

### Project & Content Priorities

  - [Content priorities were re-ordered to align with the strategic focus on high-differentiation products.](https://fathom.video/share/uwkeRPJe_rWFhecpNMs-UdE5raNvfsZE?tab=summary&timestamp=2511.0)
  - [**New Priority Order:**](https://fathom.video/share/uwkeRPJe_rWFhecpNMs-UdE5raNvfsZE?tab=summary&timestamp=2511.0)
    1.  [ACL & DMI](https://fathom.video/share/uwkeRPJe_rWFhecpNMs-UdE5raNvfsZE?tab=summary&timestamp=2511.0)
    2.  [Vault](https://fathom.video/share/uwkeRPJe_rWFhecpNMs-UdE5raNvfsZE?tab=summary&timestamp=2511.0)
    3.  [Boards & GRC refresh](https://fathom.video/share/uwkeRPJe_rWFhecpNMs-UdE5raNvfsZE?tab=summary&timestamp=2511.0)
    4.  [Other refresh buckets](https://fathom.video/share/uwkeRPJe_rWFhecpNMs-UdE5raNvfsZE?tab=summary&timestamp=2511.0)
  - [**Project Status:**](https://fathom.video/share/uwkeRPJe_rWFhecpNMs-UdE5raNvfsZE?tab=summary&timestamp=294.0)
      - [**ACL:** Build-out is complete; Carrie will send it after updating the master spreadsheet.](https://fathom.video/share/uwkeRPJe_rWFhecpNMs-UdE5raNvfsZE?tab=summary&timestamp=2577.0)
      - [**DMI:** Kezi is scheduling a second, more focused stakeholder call to gather detailed requirements.](https://fathom.video/share/uwkeRPJe_rWFhecpNMs-UdE5raNvfsZE?tab=summary&timestamp=389.0)
      - [**Vault:** Kezi will raise this topic with an internal stakeholder next week.](https://fathom.video/share/uwkeRPJe_rWFhecpNMs-UdE5raNvfsZE?tab=summary&timestamp=294.0)
      - [**Third-Party Risk Page:** Diligent is developing this internally; Carrie may be consulted on keyword clashes.](https://fathom.video/share/uwkeRPJe_rWFhecpNMs-UdE5raNvfsZE?tab=summary&timestamp=512.0)
      - [**Site Migration:** Pushed to late Q4 2026 / early Q1 2027.](https://fathom.video/share/uwkeRPJe_rWFhecpNMs-UdE5raNvfsZE?tab=summary&timestamp=571.0)

### Handoff & Reporting

  - [**Handoff:** Vivek Shankar is transitioning all project responsibilities to Carrie Chowske.](https://fathom.video/share/uwkeRPJe_rWFhecpNMs-UdE5raNvfsZE?tab=summary&timestamp=2708.0)
  - [**Scrunch Migration:** GrowthX's account data will be migrated to Diligent's instance in the coming weeks.](https://fathom.video/share/uwkeRPJe_rWFhecpNMs-UdE5raNvfsZE?tab=summary&timestamp=2457.0)
  - [**New Reporting:** The monthly performance review will now be structured at the BU level to align with Diligent's internal reporting.](https://fathom.video/share/uwkeRPJe_rWFhecpNMs-UdE5raNvfsZE?tab=summary&timestamp=2815.0)
      - [The new Looker dashboard will be shared for feedback on filtering capabilities.](https://fathom.video/share/uwkeRPJe_rWFhecpNMs-UdE5raNvfsZE?tab=summary&timestamp=2815.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Carrie:**](https://fathom.video/share/uwkeRPJe_rWFhecpNMs-UdE5raNvfsZE?tab=summary&timestamp=2615.0)
      - [Send the completed ACL build-out to Kezi.](https://fathom.video/share/uwkeRPJe_rWFhecpNMs-UdE5raNvfsZE?tab=summary&timestamp=2577.0)
      - [Recommend a CheckDat product update for BU-specific competitor groupings.](https://fathom.video/share/uwkeRPJe_rWFhecpNMs-UdE5raNvfsZE?tab=summary&timestamp=1755.0)
      - [Provide Diligent with beta access to CheckDat when available.](https://fathom.video/share/uwkeRPJe_rWFhecpNMs-UdE5raNvfsZE?tab=summary&timestamp=2383.0)
      - [Share the new BU-level Looker dashboard for feedback.](https://fathom.video/share/uwkeRPJe_rWFhecpNMs-UdE5raNvfsZE?tab=summary&timestamp=2815.0)
  - [**Vivek:**](https://fathom.video/share/uwkeRPJe_rWFhecpNMs-UdE5raNvfsZE?tab=summary&timestamp=633.0)
      - [Pull final prompts from Scrunch for Carrie to verify in CheckDat.](https://fathom.video/share/uwkeRPJe_rWFhecpNMs-UdE5raNvfsZE?tab=summary&timestamp=633.0)
      - [Initiate the migration of GrowthX's Scrunch data to Diligent's instance.](https://fathom.video/share/uwkeRPJe_rWFhecpNMs-UdE5raNvfsZE?tab=summary&timestamp=2457.0)
  - [**Kezi:**](https://fathom.video/share/uwkeRPJe_rWFhecpNMs-UdE5raNvfsZE?tab=summary&timestamp=294.0)
      - [Schedule the second, more focused DMI stakeholder call.](https://fathom.video/share/uwkeRPJe_rWFhecpNMs-UdE5raNvfsZE?tab=summary&timestamp=389.0)
      - [Discuss Vault topics with the internal stakeholder next week.](https://fathom.video/share/uwkeRPJe_rWFhecpNMs-UdE5raNvfsZE?tab=summary&timestamp=294.0)
